3245060.name: Flutter Plane
3245060.description:
Remember the simple joy of folding a paper plane and watching it soar? In Flutter Plane, that simple joy meets a fiendishly clever arcade challenge. With just a single button to "flutter" upwards, your goal is to guide your delicate craft through treacherous skies and forest below. It's all about timing.

Navigate meticulously designed handcrafted levels that will test your precision and nerve, each one a unique puzzle of obstacles and tight gaps. When you're ready for a true test of endurance, take on the infinitely replayable random-generation mode. Choose your difficulty—from a gentle flight to an insane, reflex-shattering forest—and see how far you can get. Every flight is a battle against gravity and the environment, culminating in the ultimate test: sticking the perfect landing.

Simple to learn but brutally difficult to master, Flutter Plane will have you saying "just one more try" again and again. Do you have the finesse to conquer the sky?

More Info Coming Soon!

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
